title: TSS-MPRA Protocol
author: Carlos Guzman
materials: Do PCR PCR master-mix (per sample): 25 µL LongAmp Taq 2X Master Mix - 100 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #M0287S 2.8 µL Betaine 5M Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #B0300 0.2 µL 100 micromolar (µM) of blue cap SR Primer from NEBNext Multiplex Small RNA Library Prep Set for Illumina (1-12) - 96 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #E7300L 2 µL of 10 micromolar (µM) 3' barcode primer (we use TruSeq HT Primers D70x-D7xx) The blue cap SR primer from the NEBNExt Small RNA Library Prep kit comes in 10 uM concentration. Therefore we order our own primer from IDT in order to use 100 uM concentration primers. Decrease the amount of Betaine used if using 10 uM concentrations. A B C 1 PCR Program 2 94C 30 seconds 3 15x cycles 94C 15 seconds 4 63C 30 seconds 5 70C 18 seconds*** 6 70C 5 minutes 7 4C hold infinity the extension time depends on the length of your inserts! LongAmp copies DNA at 1kb per 50 seconds

steps.title: Add 750 µL of TRIzol™ LS...
steps.instruction: Add 750 µL of TRIzol™ LS Reagent Thermo Fisher Catalog #10296010 per 250 µL of sample volume (3x) and pipette up and down 5x ( Optional: samples can be stored at 4 °C ON or at -20 °C for up to a year).

steps.title: Incubate at RT for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at RT for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Add 230 µL of Chloroform:Isoamyl alcohol...
steps.instruction: Add 230 µL of Chloroform:Isoamyl alcohol 24:1 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #C0549 and shake vigorously by hand for 00:00:15 .

steps.title: Incubate for 00:05:00 at RT
steps.instruction: Incubate for 00:05:00 at RT.

steps.title: Centrifuge samples for 00:15:00 (13,000 x g, 4℃)
steps.instruction: Centrifuge samples for 00:15:00 (13,000 x g, 4℃).

steps.title: Transfer the aqueous layer containing the...
steps.instruction: Transfer the aqueous layer containing the RNA to a new 1.5 mL LoBind tube (~ 400 - 500 uL).

steps.title: Add 1 µL of gly GlycoBlue...
steps.instruction: Add 1 µL of gly GlycoBlue Coprecipitant Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #AM9515 to each sample.

steps.title: Add 1/10th volume of 3M NaOAc ( pH 5
steps.instruction: Add 1/10th volume of 3M NaOAc ( pH 5.5 ) to each sample.

steps.title: Vortex 00:00:05 and add 1x volume...
steps.instruction: Vortex 00:00:05 and add 1x volume of isopropanol to each sample. Mix by inverting 10 times and then spin down briefly.

steps.title: Incubate ON at -20 °C (optionally 20 minutes at -20℃)
steps.instruction: Incubate ON at -20 °C (optionally 20 minutes at -20℃).

steps.title: Centrifuge samples for 00:30:00 (MAX x g, 4℃)
steps.instruction: Centrifuge samples for 00:30:00 (MAX x g, 4℃).

steps.title: Discard supernatant, wash with 1 mL 75% EtOH
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant, wash with 1 mL 75% EtOH. Discard EtOH, quick-spin, remove rest of EtOH.

steps.title: Air dry pellet at RT until...
steps.instruction: Air dry pellet at RT until it is translucent (~ 00:03:00 ). ( Optional: pellet can be frozen at -80 °C indefinitely)

steps.title: Resuspend in 30 µL TE’T [ 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 30 µL TE’T [ 0.05 % volume Tween-20, 0.1 millimolar (mM) EDTA, 10 millimolar (mM) Tris pH 7.5].

steps.title: Aliquot 15 µL of sample into 1
steps.instruction: Aliquot 15 µL of sample into 1.5 mL epi-tube and incubate at 75 °C for 00:02:00 , then chill on ice for 00:02:00

steps.title: Add 35 µL of CIP1 master-mix [ 25
steps.instruction: Add 35 µL of CIP1 master-mix [ 25.25 µL of ddH2O + 0.05% Tween-20, 5 µL CutSmart Buffer - 5.0 ml New England Biolabs Catalog #B7204S , 0.75 µL Superase-In RNase Inhibitor Thermofisher Catalog #AM2694 , 0.5 µL RQ1 RNase-Free DNase, 1,000u Promega Catalog #M6101 , 2 µL Quick CIP New England Biolabs Catalog #M0525 ] to each sample and incubate at 37 °C for 01:00:00 .

steps.title: Incubate at 75 °C for 00:01:00...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 75 °C for 00:01:00 , then chill on ice for 00:02:00

steps.title: Add 10 µL CIP 2 master-mix [ 8
steps.instruction: Add 10 µL CIP 2 master-mix [ 8.5 µL of ddH2O + 0.05% Tween-20, 1 µL CutSmart Buffer - 5.0 ml New England Biolabs Catalog #B7204S , 0.5 µL Quick CIP New England Biolabs Catalog #M0525 ] to each sample and incubate at 37 °C for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Add 500 µL TRIzol™ LS Reagent...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL TRIzol™ LS Reagent Thermo Fisher Catalog #10296010 , vortex, and incubate at RT for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Add 140 µL of TE’T and...
steps.instruction: Add 140 µL of TE’T and 140 µL of Chloroform:Isoamyl alcohol 24:1 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #C0549 to each sample.

steps.title: Vortex well, then centrifuge samples for...
steps.instruction: Vortex well, then centrifuge samples for 00:10:00 at 12,000 x g (RT).

steps.title: Transfer the upper layer into new tubes
steps.instruction: Transfer the upper layer into new tubes.

steps.title: Add 1 µL of gly GlycoBlue...
steps.instruction: Add 1 µL of gly GlycoBlue Coprecipitant Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #AM9515 to each sample.

steps.title: Add 1/10th volume of 3M NaOAc ( pH 5
steps.instruction: Add 1/10th volume of 3M NaOAc ( pH 5.5 ) to each sample.

steps.title: Vortex 00:00:05 and add 1x volume...
steps.instruction: Vortex 00:00:05 and add 1x volume of isopropanol to each sample. Mix by inverting 10 times and then spin down briefly.

steps.title: Incubate Overnight at -20 °C (optionally 20 minutes at -20℃)
steps.instruction: Incubate Overnight at -20 °C (optionally 20 minutes at -20℃).

steps.title: Centrifuge samples for 00:30:00 (MAX x g, 4℃)
steps.instruction: Centrifuge samples for 00:30:00 (MAX x g, 4℃).

steps.title: Discard supernatant, wash with 1 mL 75% EtOH
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant, wash with 1 mL 75% EtOH. Discard EtOH, quick-spin, remove rest of EtOH.

steps.title: Air dry pellet at RT until...
steps.instruction: Air dry pellet at RT until it is translucent (~ 00:03:00 ). ( Optional: pellet can be frozen at -80 °C indefinitely)

steps.title: Resuspend RNA in 6 µL TET [ 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend RNA in 6 µL TET [ 0.05 % volume Tween-20, 1 millimolar (mM) EDTA, 10 millimolar (mM) Tris pH 7.5].

steps.title: Denature RNA at 75 °C for...
steps.instruction: Denature RNA at 75 °C for 00:02:00 , then chill on ice for 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Add 9 µL of RppH master-mix...
steps.instruction: Add 9 µL of RppH master-mix to each sample, mix really well and incubate at 37 °C for 01:00:00 The PEG in the master-mix can be extremely viscous, so you need to be very careful when mixing both the master-mix together and when mixing it with the sample to ensure that it's properly mixed RppH master-mix (per sample): 3.25 µL ddH2O + 0.1% Tween-20 1.5 µL T4 RNA Ligase Reaction Buffer - 3.0 ml New England Biolabs Catalog #B0216L 3 µL 50% PEG8000 New England Biolabs Catalog #B1004S 0.25 µL Superase-In RNase Inhibitor Thermofisher Catalog #AM2694 1 µL RNA 5’ Pyrophosphohydrolase (RppH) - 200 units New England Biolabs Catalog #M0356S

steps.title: Add 10 µL 5’ Ligation master-mix,...
steps.instruction: Add 10 µL 5’ Ligation master-mix, mix well and incubate at 21 °C for 02:00:00 or 16 °C for 16:00:00 . 5' Ligation master-mix (per sample): 1 µL T4 RNA Ligase Reaction Buffer - 3.0 ml New England Biolabs Catalog #B0216L 2 µL 10 mM ATP New England Biolabs 1 µL 10 micromolar (µM) of denatured 5' SR Adapter from NEBNext Multiplex Small RNA Library Prep Set for Illumina (1-12) - 96 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #E7300L 5 µL 50% PEG8000 New England Biolabs Catalog #B1004S 1 µL T4 RNA Ligase 1 (ssRNA Ligase) - 5,000 units New England Biolabs Catalog #M0204L It is CRITICAL that you denature the 5' SR Adapter at 75 °C for 00:02:00 prior to creating the master-mix.

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 7 µL of Annealing master-mix
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 7 µL of Annealing master-mix. Annealing master-mix (per sample): 1 µL of 10 micromolar (µM) RS2 Primer (5'AGCGGATAACAATTTCACACAGGA3') 2 µL of 700 millimolar (mM) KCl 4 µL TET

steps.title: Denature RNA at 75 °C for...
steps.instruction: Denature RNA at 75 °C for 00:02:00 , then incubate at 56 °C for 00:45:00 , then cool on ice.

steps.title: Add 13 µL RT master-mix, incubate...
steps.instruction: Add 13 µL RT master-mix, incubate at 50 °C for 01:00:00 . RT master-mix (per sample): 7.5 µL ddH2O + 0.05% Tween-20 2 µL RT_KCl-_10x 2 µL 10X DTT New England Biolabs Catalog #B1034A 1 µL 10 mM dNTPs Life Technologies Catalog #10297-018 1 µL ProtoScript II Reverse Transcriptase - 10,000 units New England Biolabs Catalog #M0368L 0.5 µL RNase Inhibitor, Murine - 15,000 units New England Biolabs Catalog #M0314L

steps.title: Add 1 µL RNase A Qiagen...
steps.instruction: Add 1 µL RNase A Qiagen Catalog #19101 , incubate for 00:15:00 at 37 °C .

steps.title: Add 47 µL 20% PEG / 2
steps.instruction: Add 47 µL 20% PEG / 2.5M NaCl + 3 µL Sera-Mag SpeedBeads Carboxylate-Modified Magnetic Particles GE Healthcare Catalog #44152105050350 to each sample. Incubate at RT for 0 µL . Wash 2x with 80% EtOH. Air-dry beads until cracked (~12 minutes). Resuspend in 15 µL of 1x Novex™ Hi-Density TBE Sample Buffer (5X) Thermo Fisher Catalog #LC6678 . Incubate at RT for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Run the entire sample on 10%...
steps.instruction: Run the entire sample on 10% TBE Gel Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher Catalog #EC62752BOX with 0.5 µL of any 25bp ladder (80V for 00:15:00 , then 180V for 01:15:00 ). Perforate 0.5 mL qubit tubes 4x with 22g needle, and place qubit tubes inside 1.5 mL LoBind tube.

steps.title: Stain the gel with 20 mL of 1x TBE
steps.instruction: Stain the gel with 20 mL of 1x TBE. Buffer + 3 µL of SYBR Gold Nucleic Acid Gel Stain Contributed by users Catalog # S-11494 for 00:05:00 inside a RNase free container in the dark.

steps.title: Visualize gel and cut gel depending...
steps.instruction: Visualize gel and cut gel depending on desired size (adapters are ~118 bp, add to size you expect). This is highly dependent on the adapters you chose to use and the design of your inserts. In our case our adapters add up to 118 bp and we expect an average transcript length of 60 bp, so we are looking for bands in the ~170-180 bp range.

steps.title: Centrifuge samples for 00:05:00 (20,000 x g , RT)
steps.instruction: Centrifuge samples for 00:05:00 (20,000 x g , RT). Ensure that all the gel is crushed and spun down into 1.5 mL LoBind tubes Eppendorf Catalog #022431021 .

steps.title: Add 160 µL of TET to each
steps.instruction: Add 160 µL of TET to each.

steps.title: Shake samples for 00:45:00 at RT...
steps.instruction: Shake samples for 00:45:00 at RT (do not shake too quickly).

steps.title: Transfer slurry to UltraFree MC Column (0
steps.instruction: Transfer slurry to UltraFree MC Column (0.45 uM) Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #UFC30HVNB and spin for 00:02:00 at 1000 x g.

steps.title: Add 100 µL of TET +...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of TET + 300 mM NaCl to column and incubate for 00:30:00 at RT, then spin for 00:02:00 at 1000 x g.

steps.title: Clean up in ChIP DNA Clean...
steps.instruction: Clean up in ChIP DNA Clean & Concentrator Zymo Research Catalog #D5205 columns according to instructions. Elute in 10 µL EB.
